hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented in a JAX-based MLIP library integrated with JAX-MD and use a gated, species-dependent MACE variant, then protein-scale MD simulations on H100 GPUs will run faster than Torch+ASE baselines while maintaining comparable energy/force accuracy on SPICE2 because XLA compilation and species-aware gating reduce per-step inference overhead without sacrificing model expressivity.
